R 577(3T),TTRte23 " 1 ^ , 1983 *rft H + r ^ k l ^ ^ aft 3TTI sfftR *T?ftfcR ^T.^T.fT. 498(3?) , T^TTTTsT 14 3FTRT, 199K £KT f^TF "^TT I MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th December, 2009 G.S.R. 884(E).—Whereas the Centra! Government is satisfied that use of the drug Rimonabant is likely to involve certain risk to human beings and whereas safer alternatives to the said drug is available; And, whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the import of the said drug in the public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section-10-A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940). the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare No. G.S.R. 577(E), dated the 23rd July, 1983, namely :— In the Table appended to the said notification, after serial number 9 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be inserted namely :— "10. Rimonabant." [ F. No. X. 11014/3/2009-DFQC i VINEET CHAWDHRY, Jt. Secy. Foot Note: The principal notification was publisi^-d in the Gazette of India vide No. G.S.R. 577(E), dated the 23rd July, 1983 and last amended by G.S.R. 498(E), da.cd the 14th August, 1998. 4533 Gl/2009 Printed by the Manager.
